message:
feat(core): extend latency stages pipeline and refine beads integration

latency_stages.rs (+1,102 lines):
- Major extension of the pipeline latency modeling system with new stage
  types, budget allocation strategies, and degradation detection heuristics
- Enhanced TransportPolicy with historical cost tracking, mode distribution
  analytics, and adaptive threshold adjustment based on observed latencies
- New pipeline composition operators for multi-stage budget decomposition

beads_bridge.rs (+18 lines):
- Improved error handling in bead detail resolution
- Better degraded-mode fallback messages

beads_types.rs (+35 lines):
- Additional helper methods on BeadIssueDetail for status checking
- Enhanced BeadReadinessReport formatting

mdl_extraction.rs (+9 lines):
- Minor rustfmt formatting cleanup (line breaks in rposition call
  and vec![] literal) — no behavioral changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
